title: Charged-fermion mass spectrum and Yukawa hierarchy
statement: The charged-lepton and quark masses (Yukawa couplings) and their hierarchical pattern follow from the TECT defect-overlap structure across the three generations.
scope: OPEN scaffold. Charged-fermion Yukawa spectrum and hierarchy (pillar P6; GAP-3). Neutrino masses are E6; mixing is E5.
falsifier: A predicted charged-fermion mass ratio incompatible with measurement after input freeze (GAP-3).
no_overclaim: The mass hierarchy is not derived; the overlap mechanism is the target.
next_action: Model the generation-dependent mode overlaps and extract the leading Yukawa hierarchy; compare $m_\mu/m_e$, $m_t/m_b$.
